mapper.select: select a.sid,b.name,b.gender,b.mobile,b.birthday,a.seq,a.active,a.member_id from ncs_student a left outer join ncs_member b on a.member_id=b.m_id where a.course_id=#{cid} order by b.name
mapper.insert: insert into ncs_student set member_id=#{mid},course_id=#{cid}, seq=(select count(*)+1 from ncs_student where course_id=#{cid} and status='수강중')
mapper.delete: delete from ncs_student where member_id=#{mid} and course_id=#{cid}
mapper.select: select sid from ncs_student where member_id=#{mid} and course_id=#{cid}
